PowerShell($files = @\("AGENTS.md", "CLAUDE.md", "docs\\zmk-studio-like-app-phase2-save-design.md", "docs\\current-work-status.md"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $p = Join-Path "c:\\Users\\0000130350\\github\\zmk-config-roBa" $f; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $bom = if \($b.Length -ge 3 -and $b[0] -eq 0xEF -and $b[1] -eq 0xBB -and $b[2] -eq 0xBF\) { "UTF-8 BOM" } else { "no BOM" }; $valid = try { [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($b\) | Out-Null; "UTF-8 OK" } catch { "UTF-8 NG" }; "{0,-50} {1,-12} {2}" -f $f, $bom, $valid } })

PowerShell($path = "c:\\Users\\0000130350\\github\\zmk-config-roBa\\docs\\current-work-status.md"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $crlf = 0; $lfOnly = 0; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0x0A\) { if \($i -gt 0 -and $bytes[$i-1] -eq 0x0D\) { $crlf++ } else { $lfOnly++ } } }; "CRLF: $crlf, LF-only: $lfOnly"; "Total bytes: $\($bytes.Length\)"; "Total chars \(UTF-8\): $\([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\).Length\)")

PowerShell($path1 = "c:\\Users\\0000130350\\github\\zmk-config-roBa\\AGENTS.md"; $path2 = "c:\\Users\\0000130350\\github\\zmk-config-roBa\\docs\\current-work-status.md"; foreach \($p in @\($path1, $path2\)\) { $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $crlf = 0; $lfOnly = 0; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $b.Length; $i++\) { if \($b[$i] -eq 0x0A\) { if \($i -gt 0 -and $b[$i-1] -eq 0x0D\) { $crlf++ } else { $lfOnly++ } } }; "{0,-60} CRLF={1} LF-only={2} bytes={3}" -f \(Split-Path -Leaf $p\), $crlf, $lfOnly, $b.Length })
